based_on: Byte-precise mutation of fixtures/xor-per-neuron-bias.golden.jsonl. Differs in exactly 4 places: the 3 fixture_status fields (authoring_state, verification_state, canonical) and the single targeted topology.bias_sharing string-enum field.

what_was_NOT_mutated: topology.parameters[*].applies_to_units (each bias param's applies_to_units still has length 1, matching per_neuron semantics — now contradicts per_layer which would require length === layer size)
topology.unit_order (hidden: [h1, h2] length 2; output: [y] length 1 — these define the per_layer expected lengths)
all weight parameters, all bias parameters, all updates, parameters_before, parameters_after, forward, loss, backward

single_target_invariant: topology.bias_sharing='per_layer' implies each bias parameter's applies_to_units must list ALL units in its layer. b_h1's applies_to_units=['h1'] has length 1 but the hidden layer has 2 units. Same for b_h2. (b_y's applies_to_units=['y'] has length 1 which matches the output layer's size 1, so b_y does NOT fire.)
purpose: Anti-circularity (Csmith/CompCert lineage) for the v0.4.1 Rule 0 structural-consistency reconciler: this fixture exercises sub-check 0d/0e — bias_sharing declaration must match the per-parameter applies_to_units array shape. Without this fixture, the structural-consistency check could regress silently.
